config.uptime_kuma.api_key_empty: Please enter an API key first.
config.uptime_kuma.api_key_save_failed: Failed to save API key to vault.
config.uptime_kuma.status_disabled: La integración de Uptime Kuma está desactivada
help.uptime_kuma.api_key: Metrics API key from Uptime Kuma. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.
help.uptime_kuma.base_url: Base URL of your Uptime Kuma instance (for example https://uptime-kuma.local:3001). AuraGo automatically requests /metrics.
help.uptime_kuma.enabled: Enables the read-only Uptime Kuma integration. The agent can inspect monitor states and optionally wake up when a monitor changes between up and down.
help.uptime_kuma.insecure_ssl: Skip TLS certificate verification for self-signed certificates. Only use this inside trusted local networks.
help.uptime_kuma.poll_interval_seconds: Background polling interval in seconds for outage detection and transition events. Default: 30.
help.uptime_kuma.relay_to_agent: When enabled, AuraGo wakes the agent exactly once for each UP→DOWN or DOWN→UP transition.
help.uptime_kuma.request_timeout: Timeout in seconds for requesting the /metrics endpoint. Default: 15.
